rulings.Case Title: TAMPAS VS MCKESSON HBOC INC
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENY AS TO AGE DISCRIMINATION CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE AMONG OTHER THINGS, DEFENDANT'S HUMAN RESOURCE DIRECTOR (CHILTON) EXPRESSLY ADMITS THAT THERE WAS AN EFFORT TO REMOVE OLDER WORKERS. GRANT AS TO SEX DISCRIMINATION. NO EVIDENCE OF SEX DISCRIMINATION AND PLAINTIFF WAS REPLACED BY A WOMEN. DENY AS TO RETALIATION. GRANT'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY DEMONSTRATES THAT GRANT, DOUGHERTY AND THORNTON MADE THE DECISION TO TERMINATE PLAINTIFF AND THORNTON KNEW ABOUT PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT OF DISCRIMINATION. GRANT AS TO BREACH OF CONTRACT AND BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT. INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE IMPLIED CONTRACT WITH GOOD CAUSE COVENANT. DENY AS TO WRONGFUL DISCHARGE GIVEN THE ABOVE. (PB)
